caption: A person wearing a black long-sleeved shirt sits behind a desk, appearing in a picture-in-picture window in the corner of the screen. The main view focuses on a black box labeled "OBSIDIAN" in large red letters, with a smaller label stating "2 AUTOGRAPHS!" above it. A sports trading card is displayed atop the box, featuring a player in a white and blue uniform. The background is a black surface with orange and red graphics, including a logo that reads "JASPYS CASEBREAKS.COM". The scene remains static across the sequence, with the person in the inset window maintaining a similar pose and expression, and the objects on the table remaining in the same position. The "OBSIDIAN" branding is prominently displayed on the packaging, and the layout suggests a sports card breaking session.
